title: gymnadenia squamata
intro: Gymnadenia squamata, also known as the marsh orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is commonly found in wetland areas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Gymnadenia squamata can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in various traditional folk remedies.
